resources.string: Finish the minimal onboarding first, confirm brand, provider, and base setup, then enter the main home screen.
This page only confirms the navigation path for now and does not run real detection logic yet.
Used to verify the Breeno path and the following setup pages.
Used to verify the XiaoAi path and the following setup pages.
This round is still a placeholder flow and only confirms the provider shape the user plans to use.
Works for most providers compatible with the OpenAI API.
Reserved as a placeholder entry for future Anthropic-style integrations.
Reserved for more flexible request pipelines and custom parameters.
A real form for endpoint, model, and prompt will be added here in a later iteration.
The minimal onboarding flow is complete. Continue to the home screen to verify the navigation tree.
The chat UI is not wired yet. This screen currently validates the main chrome and the settings entry.
Content for this group will be filled in later. For now it only validates the settings tree navigation.
View and adjust provider source, default model, and related strategies.
Manage the minimal entry for endpoint, proxy, and request routing.
Reserved for future session memory and context organization settings.
Review available built-in tools and their enablement state.
Manage command execution constraints and default safety policies.
Inspect external context services and tool bridge integration state.
Manage user-defined tools and extension entry points.
View version information, documentation, and support channels.
